_meta.name: PersonalDataPseudonymizer Generalization Bench
_meta.purpose: Out-of-distribution evaluation. Hand-authored AFTER v7/v8 training was complete, BEFORE either model was scored on this set, so neither model has been tuned to it. Tests robustness across format-shift, language-shift, density-shift, self/other distinction, and false-positive control on PII-adjacent prose.
_meta.author: Claude (in conversation), 2026-04-30
_meta.scoring: GPT-4o judge, 0-100% per question, average = overall
_meta.schema_version: v7-or-v8-comparable (institutional_id ↔ account_identifier+case_or_record_id are equivalent for grading purposes)

To: All Staff

Subject: Annual benefits enrollment reminder

Dear team,

As we approach year-end, please remember to log into the benefits portal at https://benefits.acme-corp.com/login and complete your selections by November 30, 2024. If you've moved during the year, please update your address on file. For example, if you were previously at 1100 Elm Street, Apt 4D, Cambridge MA 02139 and you've now moved, you'll need to file a change-of-address form.

HR Operations
